description: Main window capabilities (ADR-30002): minimal allow-list. Custom commands are auto-permitted; renderer additionally needs core:event listen/unlisten (for app:deep-link / app:second-instance), scoped store/dialog access, and shell:allow-execute restricted to the Windows browser-url sidecar. macOS active-window data is read directly from Rust via active-win-pos-rs + osascript and does NOT need a sidecar.
